pairs.question: When was the 2021 Indian Wells Open originally scheduled to take place, and why was it postponed?
pairs.answer: The 2021 Indian Wells Open was originally scheduled for March 10–21, 2021. It was postponed to October 6–17, 2021 due to logistics disruptions caused by the COVID-19 pandemic, as the preceding year's event had been cancelled amid the pandemic's onset.

pairs.question: What tournament classifications did the 2021 Indian Wells Open hold on the ATP and WTA Tours?
pairs.answer: The 2021 Indian Wells Open was classified as an ATP Tour Masters 1000 event on the 2021 ATP Tour and a WTA 1000 event on the 2021 WTA Tour.

pairs.question: Who won the men's singles title at the 2021 Indian Wells Open, and what was significant about their victory?
pairs.answer: Cameron Norrie won the men's singles title at the 2021 Indian Wells Open. His victory was significant because he became the first British man to win the Indian Wells Masters and earned his first ATP Masters 1000 title.

pairs.question: What was notable about Paula Badosa's win at the 2021 Indian Wells Open?
pairs.answer: Paula Badosa won the women's singles title at the 2021 Indian Wells Open, becoming the first Spanish woman to win the tournament and earn her first WTA 1000 title.

pairs.question: Who were the defending champions in the men's and women's doubles draws at the 2021 Indian Wells Open, and what were the outcomes?
pairs.answer: The defending men's doubles champions were Nikola Mektić and Horacio Zeballos, while the defending women's doubles champions were Elise Mertens and Aryna Sabalenka. Mektić and Zeballos did not play together; Mektić and Mate Pavić lost in the quarterfinals, and Zeballos with Marcel Granollers was eliminated in the first round. Mertens successfully defended her title with Hsieh Su-wei, marking Mertens' second and Hsieh's third Indian Wells title.

pairs.question: Why did Dominic Thiem withdraw from the 2021 Indian Wells Open?
pairs.answer: Dominic Thiem withdrew from the 2021 Indian Wells Open because he ended his season early due to an ongoing wrist injury.

pairs.question: Which hard court venue hosted the 2021 Indian Wells Open, and what were the event dates?
pairs.answer: The 2021 Indian Wells Open was held at the Indian Wells Tennis Garden on outdoor hard courts from October 4 through October 17, 2021.
